Sun: Authority, ego, soul, leadership, father figure.
Moon: Mind, emotions, mother, intuition, fluctuating moods.
Jupiter: Wisdom, expansion, luck, wealth, spirituality, teachers.
Venus: Love, beauty, luxury, romance, arts, spouse.
Saturn: Discipline, karma, delay, restriction, hard work, sorrow.
Rahu: Ambition, illusion, foreign things, obsession, sudden events.
Ketu: Detachment, spirituality, past life karma, isolation.
